channel.title: math.KT updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: math.KT updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

item.title: On The Morel Structure Conjecture
item.description: arXiv:2607.08905v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We prove that Witt K-theory is effective over any perfect field of characteristic $2$ and consequently finish the proof of the Morel structure conjecture initiated by Bachmann.
item.dc:creator: Giacomo Bertizzolo

item.title: Exterior power operations on relative K-theory
item.description: arXiv:2607.09538v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We algebraically construct exterior power operations on higher relative algebraic K-groups and prove their desired properties such as the expected behaviour with respect to (tensor) products and composition. This builds on Grayson's description of relative K-groups in terms of explicit generators and relations and on work by Harris, the first author and Taelman for (absolute) K-groups. Among the new features in our approach is the observation that the product axiom in the classical notion of a lambda-ring is redundant.
item.dc:creator: Bernhard K\"ock, Jane Turner
